skills.pattern: WNS negative on critical path through adder — setup violation
skills.fix: Pipeline the adder: split into two stages with a register in between. Add one pipeline stage.

skills.pattern: Latch inferred in synthesis — missing else clause in always block
skills.fix: Add else clause with default assignment, or use always_ff with explicit reset for all outputs
skills.example: always @(*) begin if (en) out = in; else out = out; // latch! Fix: else out = 1'b0;
